author: lOrm
content:
Phase 2 tests delivered. Test delta: 983 → 1009 (+26 new tests across 3 files).

Files changed (test code only, no production changes):
- src/memdir/entrypoint.rs: +14 new tests
- src/memory.rs: +9 new tests (B4 + B6)
- src/session/pricing.rs: +5 new tests (B5)

Spec→test mapping:
| Spec | Tests |
|------|-------|
| B1 discovery order | load_prefers_root_memory_over_openclaudia_subdir, load_falls_back_to_openclaudia_subdir, load_falls_back_to_home_openclaudia, load_with_home_unset_still_finds_root_memory, empty_file_returns_some_not_none |
| B2 line truncation | exactly_at_line_limit_is_not_truncated, over_line_limit_keeps_first_n_lines, trailing_newline_at_exact_limit_is_not_truncated, trailing_newline_one_over_limit_truncates, whitespace_only_file_no_truncation |
| B3 byte truncation | over_byte_limit_is_utf8_safe, utf8_safe_truncate_two_byte_sequence_boundary, utf8_safe_truncate_two_byte_sequence_internal_offset, utf8_safe_truncate_three_byte_sequence_boundary, utf8_safe_truncate_three_byte_sequence_internal_offset, byte_truncation_cuts_at_char_boundary_not_newline |
| B4 SQLite round-trips | b4_schema_migration_reaches_v3_with_core_sections, b4_open_with_explicit_path_is_isolated, b4_archival_memory_fts_round_trip, b4_recent_session_round_trip, b4_core_memory_upsert_round_trip, b4_coding_pattern_confidence_increments_on_duplicate, b4_archival_memory_delete_removes_row, b4_fts_search_with_operator_keywords_does_not_error |
| B5 calculate_cost | b5_cache_read_tokens_apply_point_one_ratio, b5_cache_write_tokens_apply_one_point_two_five_ratio, b5_all_four_token_buckets_sum_correctly, b5_unknown_model_returns_none, b5_zero_tokens_returns_zero_cost |
| B6 missing=None | load_returns_none_when_no_candidate_exists, b6_open_new_path_creates_db_without_error, b6_open_for_project_creates_directory |

No #[allow] attributes added to new test code.
No production code changes.
No new gap issues (all divergences already tracked: G4/G5/G6 under #548, G1 under #604, G2/G3 under #508).

Evidence: cargo build PASS, cargo test --lib 1009/1009 PASS, clippy --tests -D warnings clean on my files, rustfmt --check clean on my files.
